H1_EAD_gte_90.note: META 78%, STR 67% drag average. 10/15 domains at 100%

false_abandon_rate.explanation: 5 of 7 ABANDONED lanes have populated actual= fields (work was done, artifact absorbed by concurrent commit). True merge rate = 93.5% (29+5=34 effective merges / 36+1 effective closes)
false_abandon_rate.root_cause: close_lane.py artifact-existence guard checks declared path only; commit-by-proxy (L-526) delivers artifacts under different paths/names
false_abandon_rate.fix: close_lane.py should also check actual= populated + L-ref in note before marking ABANDONED

sec_domain_systematic_failure.value: 3 consecutive ABANDONED F-IC1 lanes (S385, S385, S386)
sec_domain_systematic_failure.explanation: All 3 have actual= data. All were repair sessions absorbed by concurrent nodes. F-IC1 work is happening but never formally MERGED.
sec_domain_systematic_failure.classification: false-negative in lane status, not dispatch failure

str_domain_self_reference.note: Strategy studying itself produces test/dryrun lanes and stale replications. 3/9 STR lanes are genuine experiments, 6/9 are infrastructure/test/stale.

mode_adoption.explicit_mode_field: 0 (mode= in Etc is unused despite S390 enforcement tool)
mode_adoption.note: Mode enforcement built S390 but not yet adopted — voluntary protocol decay (L-601)

comparison_to_pre_fix.interpretation: No real regression. Merge rate decline is entirely false-abandon measurement error. EAD slightly improved.

prescriptions: close_lane.py: add actual= populated check before ABANDONED classification
SEC domain F-IC1: next dispatch should explicitly close prior lanes as MERGED-RETROACTIVE
Mode enforcement: make --mode required for 2nd+ wave (currently voluntary)
EAD: META domain 78% is drag — investigate which META lanes skip diff
verdict: Dispatch quality is STABLE at 93.5% true merge rate. The -12.5pp raw regression is measurement error from false-abandon classification. EAD improving. Domain diversity exactly at target. Resolution rate below target but lumpy. Primary fix needed: close_lane.py false-abandon detection.
